hypothesis: A contrastive self-supervised pretraining of EfficientNet-B0 on a corpus of ≥5,000 unlabeled cathode SEM images spanning NCM compositions and imaging conditions, followed by fine-tuning with ≤50 labeled additive-containing images per class, will yield at least a 5 percentage-point absolute increase in macro F1 on domain-shifted additive-containing classes compared to an ImageNet-initialized EfficientNet-B0 pretrained on additive-free labeled data and fine-tuned with the same labeled-data constraint.
